allowed_diff.reason: storage update time is generated by each backend clock and is not business state
timestamp precision and timezone serialization differ across storage engines
summary update timestamp is clock-derived; presence, version, owner, and content are compared
memory timestamps mirror event storage precision and are not used for recall equivalence
memory recall order is backend-dependent; entries are sorted for multiset comparison
